# CleanMax Laundry

CleanMax Laundry is a full-service laundromat in Pomona, California, serving the Pomona Valley and Inland Empire. We offer self-service laundry, wash & fold drop-off, commercial laundry pickup and delivery, and specialty services for comforters and large loads.

- Address: 1009 E Holt Ave, Pomona, CA 91767
- Phone: (909) 248-7305
- Email: laundry@cleanmaxlaundry.com
- Hours: 6 AM – 10 PM, seven days a week
- Payment: Cash, credit card, and in-app payment via the CleanMax app

## Services

- **Self-service laundry**: Modern Wascomat washers and dryers, open daily 6 AM to 10 PM.
- **Wash & fold**: $1.50/lb with a $25 order minimum. Same-day and next-day turnaround available.
- **Pickup & delivery**: Scheduled residential and commercial pickup throughout the Pomona Valley and Inland Empire. 24–48 hour turnaround.
- **Commercial laundry**: Weekly, biweekly, and on-call service for restaurants, gyms, Airbnbs, hotels, salons, medical offices, and more.
- **Comforters & large loads**: Large-capacity machines for bedding, duvets, and oversized items.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com
- Locations served: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com/locations
- Wash & fold pricing: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com/wash-and-fold/pricing
- Pickup & delivery: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com/pickup-delivery
- Commercial laundry: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com/commercial-laundry
- Commercial quote request: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com/commercial-quote
- Comforters & large loads: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com/comforters-large-loads
- Blog: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com/blog
- Spanish site: https://cleanmaxlaundry.com/es

## Service area

Pomona, Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Chino, Chino Hills, Upland, Claremont, Diamond Bar, West Covina, Covina, Glendora, La Verne, San Dimas, Azusa, Walnut, Corona, Jurupa Valley, Montclair. Pickup & delivery additionally serves Fontana, Rialto, Colton, and Riverside.

## Languages

Content is available in English and Spanish. Spanish pages are mirrored under the /es/ path prefix.
